sql_array: CREATE TABLE ip_addresses (id UInt32, ipv4 UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT IPv6NumToString(IPv4ToIPv6(ipv4)) AS ipv6_address FROM ip_addresses WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE ip_addresses SET ipv4 = IPv4StringToNum('10.0.0.1') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, IPv6NumToString(IPv4ToIPv6(ipv4)) AS ipv6_address FROM ip_addresses;
